description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a perimeter wall and featuring a private driveway and garage. The exterior is finished in a dark gray color with white window frames and accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor living spaces, including a patio with seating and a small swimming pool. A tall palm tree is integrated into the landscaping, adding a touch of greenery and shade to the property. The front area includes a covered carport and a secure entrance gate, while the rear features a private backyard with a pool. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with dark gray walls, large windows, a private driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped with a palm tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, large windows, and a palm tree near the patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the palm tree in the outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, and grouped windows on the upper and lower floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the palm tree, rear entrance, and a more enclosed section of the perimeter wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
